title: Add support for copyup by default on tmpfs mounts
body:
Also begin adding support for shm-size. Needs to be made to work
on /dev/shm as well.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Nit in help text otherwise LGTM
Ok I am going to split this into two different PRs one for the copyup and one for shmsize.
